heading: Step 2: Test the AppSync API with a Lambda resolver as its data source.
body:
You can use the AWS (Amazon Web Services) AppSync console or
[Postman](https://www.postman.com/) to test the AppSync API (Application Programming Interface).

The API (Application Programming Interface) request and response payloads must be in the MongoDB
Atlas Data API (v1) format. Each query must include the necessary
request query and body parameters. To learn more about the Data
API (Application Programming Interface) syntax, see [MongoDB Atlas Data API (v1)](atlas/app-services/data-api/openapi):

AWS (Amazon Web Services)

 AppSync Console

Postman
